Shall Statement: The system shall authenticate users using approved credentials.
The system shall enforce role-based access controls for protected functions.
The system shall log successful and failed user sign-in attempts.
The system shall lock a user account after five consecutive failed sign-in attempts.
The system shall allow authorized administrators to reset user account passwords.
The system shall require passwords to meet the configured complexity policy.
The system shall expire temporary passwords after first successful use.
The system shall encrypt sensitive data while stored in the system database.
The system shall encrypt sensitive data while transmitted over external interfaces.
The system shall validate all required fields before saving a user record.
The system shall display a clear validation message for invalid user input.
The system shall prevent duplicate user accounts with the same email address.
The system shall record the creation time and creator for each managed record.
The system shall record the last modification time and modifier for each managed record.
The system shall retain audit records for at least seven years.
The system shall allow authorized users to search records by identifier.
The system shall allow authorized users to filter records by status and date range.
The system shall present search results in pageable lists.
The system shall export authorized search results to comma-separated values format.
The system shall generate a printable report for an individual record.
The system shall assign a unique system-generated identifier to each new record.
The system shall prevent deletion of records that are referenced by active transactions.
The system shall allow authorized users to archive inactive records.
The system shall restore archived records only for authorized administrators.
The system shall display record status using configured status values.
The system shall notify assigned users when a record is created.
The system shall notify assigned users when a record is reassigned.
The system shall notify owners when a record approaches its due date.
The system shall allow users to acknowledge system notifications.
The system shall maintain notification delivery history for each notification.
The system shall synchronize system time with an approved time source.
The system shall record timestamps in Coordinated Universal Time.
The system shall display timestamps in the user-selected local time zone.
The system shall support concurrent access by at least 200 active users.
The system shall complete standard record retrieval operations within two seconds under normal load.
The system shall complete standard record save operations within three seconds under normal load.
The system shall recover service availability within fifteen minutes after a planned restart.
The system shall perform scheduled backups at least once every 24 hours.
The system shall verify backup integrity after each scheduled backup.
The system shall restore backed-up data to a designated recovery environment.
The system shall monitor application availability and generate an alert after service interruption.
The system shall monitor available storage capacity and alert when remaining capacity falls below 20 percent.
The system shall restrict administrative functions to authenticated administrator roles.
The system shall terminate inactive user sessions after 30 minutes.
The system shall prevent session identifiers from being reused after user sign-out.
The system shall require multi-factor authentication for administrator sign-in.
The system shall record security-relevant configuration changes in the audit log.
The system shall allow administrators to configure password expiration periods.
The system shall allow administrators to configure notification delivery preferences.
The system shall validate imported data against the approved import schema.
The system shall reject import files that contain unrecognized columns.
The system shall provide an import error report for rejected data rows.
The system shall process valid import rows without discarding valid rows because of unrelated errors.
The system shall maintain an import transaction summary for each upload.
The system shall allow authorized users to download the approved import template.
The system shall provide an application programming interface for authorized external integrations.
The system shall authenticate external application programming interface requests using approved tokens.
The system shall return standardized error responses for invalid application programming interface requests.
The system shall limit application programming interface requests according to configured rate limits.
The system shall maintain version compatibility for published application programming interface endpoints.
The system shall validate outbound messages before transmission to external systems.
The system shall retry failed outbound integrations according to the configured retry policy.
The system shall record integration failures with sufficient diagnostic detail.
The system shall allow authorized users to view integration status.
The system shall prevent unauthorized modification of system configuration values.
The system shall maintain configuration change history.
The system shall require approval before applying production configuration changes.
The system shall display the current application version to authorized administrators.
The system shall provide online help for primary user workflows.
The system shall provide accessible labels for interactive user interface controls.
The system shall support keyboard-only navigation for all primary user interface functions.
The system shall meet applicable contrast requirements for user interface text and controls.
The system shall display meaningful error messages without exposing sensitive system details.
The system shall confirm destructive user actions before executing them.
The system shall allow users to cancel a record edit before saving changes.
The system shall preserve unsaved user-entered data during recoverable validation failures.
The system shall sort list views by user-selected supported columns.
The system shall allow users to configure visible columns in supported list views.
The system shall retain user display preferences across sessions.
The system shall generate unique correlation identifiers for externally initiated transactions.
The system shall include correlation identifiers in relevant application logs.
The system shall protect log files from unauthorized modification.
The system shall rotate application logs according to the configured retention policy.
The system shall provide health-check endpoints for monitoring systems.
The system shall report system dependency health through the health-check endpoint.
The system shall prevent unsupported browser versions from accessing protected workflows.
The system shall display a supported-browser message when access is denied.
The system shall maintain compatibility with the approved operating system environments.
The system shall validate all uploaded files for allowed type and size before storage.
The system shall scan uploaded files for malicious content before making them available.
The system shall store uploaded files using system-generated filenames.
The system shall restrict download of uploaded files to authorized users.
The system shall retain document version history for managed documents.
The system shall allow authorized users to compare two versions of a managed document.
The system shall generate an audit event when a managed document is downloaded.
The system shall support configurable data-retention periods by record category.
The system shall permanently delete expired records after the approved retention period.
The system shall generate a retention action report for authorized administrators.
The system shall provide operational metrics for request volume and response time.
The system shall allow administrators to view system error trends.
